data.description:
After a successful update, only recommend a manual `foolery restart` if the current environment cannot handle it automatically. Specifically, suppress the restart recommendation when both conditions are true:

1. The OS is Debian Linux
2. Foolery is registered as a systemd service (detectable via `systemctl`)

In all other cases (non-Debian OS, or Debian without a systemd service registration), show the existing restart recommendation.
